query:
SELECT w.id, w.name, a.weekStartDate, a.timeBlocks, a.confirmedAt
FROM workers w
LEFT JOIN availability a ON w.id = a.workerId
WHERE w.name LIKE '%дјЉеЁњ%' OR w.name LIKE '%Ina%'
ORDER BY a.weekStartDate DESC
LIMIT 10;
